commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the ACP local-path-only image guard, changes Synology invalid-token throttling to threshold locking with a zero-budget clamp, adds regression tests, and carries small cron, pairing-test, and Discord model-picker maintenance updates.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows URL-only image media is normalized but dropped before the media cache, and Synology invalid-token locking uses strict `>` so the configured budget is exceeded by one request; I did not run tests in this read-only review.
